summary: We introduce a radical-fragment many-body expansion at the two-body level (MBE2) for quantum chemistry of linear alkanes. Instead of heterolytic bond cleavage with hydrogen capping atoms and electrostatic embedding like in Fragment Molecular Orbital (FMO), we perform homolytic C-C bond cleavage to produce open-shell radical fragments (CH3, CH2) treated with restricted open-shell Hartree-Fock (ROHF) in isolation. The two-body MBE2 assembly formula reconstructs total alkane energies from only four unique fragment calculations regardless of chain length, reducing the maximum qubit requirement. We benchmark this framework against five energy solvers (RHF, CCSD, VQE, ADAPT-VQE, and SQD) across 11 linear alkanes from butane (C4H10) to hexacosane (C26H54). The MBE2 decomposition achieves a 12.3x qubit reduction for C26H54 (from 368 to 30 qubits) and a 12.8x reduction in unique calculations via symmetry exploitation. MBE2-VQE and MBE2-SQD (executed on IBM quantum hardware) closely track their respective classical MBE2 references, demonstrating that fragmentation-based quantum chemistry is viable for scaling quantum solvers to large molecular systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自由基碎片的二体多体展开方法（MBE2），通过均裂C-C键产生开壳层自由基碎片（CH3, CH2）并用ROHF处理，仅需四种唯一碎片计算即可重构线性烷烃总能量，大幅降低量子比特需求。在11种线性烷烃上测试了五种能量求解器，对C26H54实现了12.3倍量子比特缩减和12.8倍计算量缩减，并在IBM量子硬件上验证了MBE2-VQE和MBE2-SQD的可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统量子化学方法在处理大分子时面临量子比特需求过高的瓶颈（如C26H54需368量子比特），而现有的碎片方法（如FMO）依赖异裂键解和氢原子封端，计算开销大。本文旨在通过均裂C-C键的自由基碎片化策略，大幅降低量子计算资源需求，使量子求解器能够扩展到更大分子体系。
AI.method: 提出MBE2方法：对线性烷烃进行C-C键均裂，产生CH3和CH2开壳层自由基碎片，用ROHF描述；仅在二体水平进行多体展开组合，总能量由四种唯一碎片计算重构；在经典（RHF, CCSD）和量子（VQE, ADAPT-VQE, SQD）求解器上验证，并在IBM量子硬件上运行MBE2-VQE和MBE2-SQD。
AI.result: 对C26H54实现量子比特从368降至30（12.3倍缩减）；利用对称性将唯一计算量降低12.8倍；MBE2-VQE和MBE2-SQD在IBM量子硬件上的结果与经典MBE2参考值高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 基于自由基碎片的MBE2方法能有效降低量子计算资源需求，且量子求解器结果与经典结果一致，证明碎片化量子化学是实现量子求解器规模化应用于大分子体系的可行路径。

title: Side-Chain Tuning of Thermal-Expansion Crossover in Metal-Organic Frameworks
summary: Achieving continuous control over macroscopic thermal expansion remains a fundamental challenge in solid-state physics. Using classical and path-integral molecular dynamics alongside lattice dynamics at near-\emph{ab initio} accuracy, we report an entropy-driven thermal-expansion crossover from positive (PTE) to negative thermal expansion (NTE) in alkoxy-functionalized MOF-5, an archetypal metal-organic framework (MOF). We demonstrate that this non-linear response is continuously tunable via the alkoxy side-chain length, quantified by the number of carbon atoms $n$ grafted onto the archetypal cubic MOF-5 framework: systems with short chains ($n \le 2$) exhibit monotonic NTE, whereas longer chains ($n \ge 3$) trigger a pronounced PTE-to-NTE crossover. At low temperatures, thermal activation of longer side chains opens additional conformational states and generates steric pressure inside the pore, driving positive expansion through a gain in side-chain conformational entropy. Conversely, at elevated temperatures, the side chains enhance transverse linker fluctuations and strengthen the string-tension mechanism associated with low-frequency framework modes, causing structural contraction favored by framework vibrational entropy. Finally, by varying the concentration of side-chain-functionalized linkers, the thermal expansion coefficient can be continuously regulated to realize negative, near-zero, and positive thermal expansion within selected temperature windows. These results establish side-chain engineering as a practical route for programming macroscopic thermodynamic responses in MOFs.

AI.tldr: 通过分子动力学模拟和晶格动力学研究，发现烷氧基功能化MOF-5中由熵驱动的热膨胀从正(PTE)到负(NTE)的转变可通过侧链长度连续调控，短链(n≤2)显示单调NTE，长链(n≥3)呈现PTE-to-NTE crossover，且通过调节功能化连接体浓度可实现热膨胀系数的连续调控。
AI.motivation: 在固体物理中，实现宏观热膨胀的连续控制是一个基础性挑战，尤其是正热膨胀到负热膨胀的可控转变尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 采用经典和路径积分分子动力学(PIMD)结合晶格动力学方法，在近第一性原理精度下研究烷氧基功能化MOF-5体系；系统改变侧链碳原子数n（n≤2和n≥3）以及功能化连接体浓度。
AI.result: 短侧链(n≤2)体系表现单调NTE；长侧链(n≥3)体系出现明显的PTE-to-NTE crossover。低温下长侧链构象熵驱动正膨胀；高温下侧链增强横向连接体涨落并通过弦张力机制导致收缩。通过改变侧链浓度可连续调控热膨胀系数至负、近零或正热膨胀。
AI.conclusion: 侧链工程可作为编程MOF宏观热力学响应的实用途径，实现了热膨胀的可控调节。

title: Prebiotic Chemistry Assemblies of L-Cysteine on Defect-Free Pyrite Terraces
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures. Supplementary information is available as an ancillary file
summary: Wächtershäuser's theory proposes iron-sulfur minerals as key platforms for molecular synthesis and supramolecular organization in prebiotic environments. However, defects have been traditionally considered at the center of such assemblies, thereby underestimating the contributions of regular and pristine interfaces. Here, we combine scanning tunneling microscopy and spectroscopy (STM/STS) with density functional theory (DFT) to investigate the fundamental prebiotic chemistry system of L-Cysteine (L-Cys) on defectless FeS$_2$(100) terraces. To do so, we first achieved atomically ordered, defect-free terraces that act as support of two distinct supramolecular phases of L-Cys: one compact, highly ordered supramolecular network and another less packed, labile supramolecular network. We unveil trimer-based intermolecular interactions to be at the origin of these pattern formations. These results demonstrate that L-Cys self-assemblies can be hosted on flawless FeS$_2$ terraces due to the cooperative interplay between substrate electronic structure and intermolecular interactions, without the participation of dominant defects. Therefore, the autocatalytic activity of pyrite could have triggered the on-surface polymerization process of these non-static self-assembled structures under primordial conditions, thereby endorsing Wächtershäuser's postulates on the origin of life.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过STM/STS和DFT方法，发现在无缺陷的FeS₂(100)平台上，L-半胱氨酸可以形成两种不同的超分子网络（致密有序网络和松散不稳定网络），其形成源于三聚体分子间相互作用，而非传统认为的缺陷位点。这支持了Wächtershäuser关于铁硫矿物在生命起源中起关键作用的理论。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为前生命化学中的分子组装主要发生在矿物缺陷位点，低估了规则界面的贡献。本研究旨在验证无缺陷的黄铁矿表面能否作为分子自组装的平台，从而检验Wächtershäuser理论的合理性。
AI.method: 采用扫描隧道显微镜/扫描隧道谱学（STM/STS）结合密度泛函理论（DFT），首先制备原子级有序、无缺陷的FeS₂(100)台阶面，然后在其上沉积L-半胱氨酸（L-Cys），观察并分析形成的超分子结构。
AI.result: 在无缺陷FeS₂(100)表面观察到两种L-Cys超分子相：紧密有序的超分子网络和松散不稳定的超分子网络。分子间以三聚体形式相互作用驱动图案形成，且自组装由基底电子结构与分子间相互作用的协同效应主导，无需缺陷参与。
AI.conclusion: 无缺陷黄铁矿表面能够作为L-Cys自组装的宿主，其自催化活性可能触发了非静态自组装结构在原始条件下的表面聚合过程，从而支持了Wächtershäuser关于生命起源的假说。

title: Observation of Intrinsic Anderson Localization in Few-Layer ReS$_2$
summary: Electron localization phenomena are expected to play an important role in the transport properties of two-dimensional materials. Rhenium disulfide (ReS$_2$), with its narrow conduction bandwidth, is uniquely susceptible to this effect. However, extrinsic disorder caused by fabrication methods obscures inherent localization behavior arising from reduced dimensionality and degrades transport properties. We report intrinsic Anderson localization in few-layer ReS$_2$ by eliminating extrinsic fabrication-induced disorder through all-dry van der Waals assembly and suppressing interface charge trapping through a hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) gate dielectric. Temperature-dependent transport reveals a crossover from nearest-neighbor hopping to two-dimensional (2D) Mott variable-range hopping (VRH). The non-monotonic gate-voltage dependence of activation energy provides direct access to the energy-resolved band-tail density of states of the ReS$_2$ conduction band. 2D Mott VRH yields a localization length of (3.5 $\pm$ 0.1) nm, an order of magnitude larger than disorder-dominated devices, providing a quantitative characterization of intrinsic Anderson localization in ReS$_2$.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过全干法范德瓦尔斯组装和六方氮化硼栅介质，消除了制造过程中的外在无序，首次在少层ReS₂中观测到本征安德森局域化，并定量表征了局域化长度（3.5 nm）和能带尾态密度。
AI.motivation: 二维材料中的电子局域化对输运性质至关重要，但ReS₂因窄导带宽度极易受此影响，然而制备引入的外在无序掩盖了本征局域化行为，亟需消除外在无序以研究本征特性。
AI.method: 采用全干法范德瓦尔斯组装消除制造无序，利用hBN栅介质抑制界面电荷捕获；通过变温输运测量分析导电机制，结合栅压依赖的激活能获取能带尾态密度。
AI.result: 观察到从最近邻跳跃到二维Mott变程跳跃的交叉；局域化长度为(3.5±0.1) nm，比无序主导器件大一个数量级；非单调栅压依赖的激活能直接揭示了ReS₂导带尾态密度。
AI.conclusion: 成功实现了定量表征本征安德森局域化，为理解ReS₂中低维电子局域化行为提供了基准，并展示了范德瓦尔斯组装在揭示本征物理中的关键作用。

title: Design Principles for Quasi-Isotropic Exchange in Rare-Earth Quantum Magnets
summary: Rare-earth quantum materials provide a promising platform for emergent phenomena ranging from quantum spin liquids with long-range entanglement to topological magnetic textures. However, the strong spin-orbit coupling that stabilizes their low-energy pseudospin degrees of freedom also tends to generate strongly anisotropic exchange interactions, complicating the realization of quasi-isotropic Heisenberg magnetism. Here we investigate the microscopic origin of superexchange in $\mathrm{Ce}^{3+}$- and $\mathrm{Yb}^{3+}$-based insulators with edge-sharing octahedral geometry. Using degenerate perturbation theory for a multiorbital Hubbard model, we show that isotropic exchange originates predominantly from virtual hopping within the ground-state Kramers doublet, whereas anisotropic interactions arise primarily from processes involving excited multiplets. This leads to a simple orbital design principle: quasi-isotropic exchange is promoted when the ground-state doublet has a strong maximal-angular-momentum character with respect to the quantization axis perpendicular to the superexchange plane spanned by rare-earth and ligand ions. We demonstrate this mechanism for both ideal and distorted geometries and show that it is broadly consistent with experimentally studied Yb-based insulators. Our results establish a practical framework for engineering quasi-isotropic interactions in rare-earth quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过微扰理论揭示了Ce³⁺和Yb³⁺基绝缘体中超交换相互作用的微观起源，指出各向同性交换主要来源于基态Kramers二重态内的虚拟跃迁，而各向异性相互作用则来自激发多重态过程，并提出了实现准各向同性交换的轨道设计原则。
AI.motivation: 稀土量子材料中强自旋-轨道耦合导致交换相互作用高度各向异性，难以实现准各向同性的海森堡磁性，因此需要从微观层面理解并设计各向同性交换机制。
AI.method: 对多轨道Hubbard模型使用简并微扰理论，分析Ce³⁺和Yb³⁺基绝缘体中共边八面体几何结构中的超交换过程，分别考察基态Kramers二重态和激发多重态对交换各向异性的贡献。
AI.result: 发现各向同性交换主要来自基态Kramers二重态内的虚拟跃迁，而各向异性交换来自涉及激发多重态的过程；当基态二重态在垂直于超交换平面的方向上有强最大角动量特征时，准各向同性交换被促进。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个实用的轨道设计原则，可用于在稀土量子材料中工程化准各向同性相互作用，且该机制与实验研究的Yb基绝缘体结果一致。

title: Floquet Majorana flat bands and emergent Cooper pair symmetries in $p-$wave magnet$-$superconductor heterostructure
summary: We investigate the emergence of topological superconductivity at the two-dimensional heterostructure interface between a $p$-wave magnet (pWM) and an $s$-wave superconductor. By analyzing nodal gap closings, we identify seven distinct nodal topological phases, each characterized by the presence of Majorana zero-energy flat bands and quantized zero-bias conductance peaks. We demonstrate that the effective $p$-wave nature of the system gives rise to spin-triplet pairing correlations with even-frequency, odd-parity and odd-frequency, even-parity symmetries. Notably, the introduction of inter-orbital hopping induces an exotic orbital-singlet term characterized by simultaneous odd-parity and odd-frequency. Furthermore, we explore the transition from static phases to Floquet topological regimes through periodic driving. These driven phases host both zero and $π$ Majorana flat bands, with transport signatures governed by the Floquet sum rule. Most significantly, we show that periodic driving fundamentally reshapes the topological and superconducting landscape by generating multiple nodal points that support higher winding numbers and multiple Majorana flat bands, while the emergent Floquet degree of freedom doubles the number of symmetry-allowed Cooper-pair correlations. The first class of correlations is hosted by the even-Floquet sectors and has a direct counterpart in the static limit. In contrast, the second is a distinct Floquet-generated class that confines to the odd-Floquet sectors, representing a fundamentally nonequilibrium pairing channel that cannot exist in static systems. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness of these topological modes against strong disorder, confirming their potential for stable fault-tolerant applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了p波磁体与s波超导体二维异质结界面处的拓扑超导电性，发现了七种不同的拓扑相，并展示了周期驱动可产生全新的非平衡配对通道，这些拓扑模式对强无序具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 探索p波磁体与s波超导体异质结界面处的拓扑超导电性，特别是研究周期驱动（Floquet）如何重塑拓扑与超导特性，以及能否产生静态系统中不存在的新奇量子态。
AI.method: 通过节点能隙闭合分析、拓扑相分类、Floquet周期驱动方法、输运特性分析，以及无序鲁棒性测试。
AI.result: 识别出七种节点拓扑相，发现Majorana零能平带和量化零偏压电导峰；周期驱动生成了更高的绕组数、多重Majorana平带，并产生了一种仅存在于奇数Floquet扇区的非平衡配对通道；拓扑模式对强无序具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 周期驱动能够从根本上重塑拓扑超导景观，创造静态体系无法实现的非平衡配对通道，且这些拓扑模式具有强鲁棒性，有望用于容错量子应用。

title: Toward a local manipulation of DNA by quantum fields
summary: Hydrogen bonds are the fundamental backbone for deoxyribo-nucleic acid (DNA) stability. In this letter we propose a new strategy based on plasmonic cavities to perform a local manipulation of hydrogen bonds in DNA. The analysis is performed using state-of-the-art Quantum Electrodynamics Coupled Cluster calculations (QED-CC). We demonstrate that in standard strong coupling regimes, small but appreciable local modifications of the nucleotide bases' interactions can be induced in a totally non-intrusive manner. The effect can eventually be enhanced if ultra-strong coupling conditions can be reached. Our strategy provides an alternative approach to methodologies based on a collective coupling to perform optical DNA manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用等离激元腔在强耦合条件下非侵入式地局部调控DNA氢键，并通过QED-CC计算验证了该策略的可行性。
AI.motivation: 氢键是DNA稳定性的基础，现有光学操控方法多依赖集体耦合，缺乏局部、非侵入式的氢键调控手段。作者旨在探索基于等离激元腔的新策略，以实现DNA氢键的局部操控。
AI.method: 采用量子电动力学耦合簇（QED-CC）计算方法，模拟标准强耦合和超强耦合条件下等离激元腔对DNA核苷酸碱基间氢键的局部影响。
AI.result: 在标准强耦合条件下，可实现对核苷酸碱基相互作用的微小但可察觉的局部修饰；在超强耦合条件下，该效应可进一步增强。
AI.conclusion: 该策略提供了一种替代传统集体耦合方法的新途径，可用于光学DNA操控，具有非侵入性和局部性的优势。

title: Thermal rectification due to phonon confinement in nanoparticles
summary: We demonstrate that thermal rectification can arise at the contact between two spherical nanoparticles of identical material but different size due to the geometric confinement of phonons. This confinement suppresses long-wavelength phonons differently in differently sized particles and creates a size-dependent gap in the phonon density of states. This gives rise to direction-dependent heat transport even in perfectly homogeneous materials. We develop an analytical model based on phonon confinement and phonon ray-tracing in the Casimir regime and derive expressions for heat fluxes and rectification efficiency as functions of particle sizes and temperatures. The model predicts measurable rectification efficiencies for nanoparticles with radii of a few tens of nanometers, reaching fraction of percent at room temperature and much larger values at low temperatures. The proposed mechanism provides a straightforward and scalable route to thermal rectification in granular nanomaterials without requiring material heterogeneity or strong nonlinearities.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，两个相同材料但尺寸不同的球形纳米颗粒接触时，由于声子几何约束会导致热整流效应，并建立了解析模型来预测整流效率与颗粒尺寸、温度的关系。
AI.motivation: 探索在均匀材料中仅通过几何尺寸差异实现热整流的可能性，避免对材料异质性或强非线性的依赖，为纳米材料中的热管理提供可扩展的路径。
AI.method: 基于声子约束和Casimir区间的声子射线追踪方法，建立了解析模型，推导了热流和整流效率作为颗粒尺寸和温度函数的表达式。
AI.result: 模型预测在半径几十纳米的颗粒中可观测到整流效应，室温下效率可达分之几百分比，低温下效率显著增大。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需材料异质性或强非线性的、简单可扩展的纳米颗粒材料热整流机制。

title: Local magnon modes studied by dynamic magnetic pair-density function analysis
summary: The dynamic magnetic pair-density function (DymPDF) $D_{\rm M}(r, E)$ is obtained via the Fourier transform of the dynamic magnetic structure factor, $S_{\rm M}(Q, E)$, which is measured using nonpolarized inelastic neutron scattering. While there is a long history of magnetic excitation studies with $S_{\rm M}(Q, E)$, there are no reports on $D_{\rm M}(r, E)$. In this study, we examine simple magnet models and representative magnet examples, such as FeTiO$_{3}$ and YBa$_{2}$Cu$_{3}$O$_{6}$, to investigate the real-space dynamics of $D_{\rm M}(r, E)$. We derive the $D_{\rm M}(r, E)$ equations for simple magnet models in a low energy limit. By comparing these equations to the simulations, we demonstrate the characteristic energy dependence of real-space local magnon modes, including the transition of the magnon mode from acoustic to optical. Our novel analysis reveals the local magnon modes accompanied by a sign change in each spin-pair correlation at a given energy in nanoscale real space even under non-periodic conditions. This method is unique for studying local magnetic dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文首次通过非极化非弹性中子散射测量得到的动态磁结构因子 $S_{\rm M}(Q, E)$ 进行傅里叶变换，获得了动态磁配对密度函数 $D_{\rm M}(r, E)$，并通过简单磁模型和代表性材料（FeTiO$_3$、YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_6$）展示了其在实空间中的局域磁动力学特性，揭示了声学到光学磁振子模式的转变以及自旋对关联的符号变化。
AI.motivation: 尽管动态磁结构因子 $S_{\rm M}(Q, E)$ 在磁激发研究中已被长期使用，但从未有人将其转换到实空间得到 $D_{\rm M}(r, E)$。本研究旨在填补这一空白，发展一种能直接观察实空间局域磁动力学的新方法。
AI.method: 通过对非极化非弹性中子散射测得的 $S_{\rm M}(Q, E)$ 进行傅里叶变换得到 $D_{\rm M}(r, E)$；在低能极限下推导简单磁模型的 $D_{\rm M}(r, E)$ 方程；并对 FeTiO$_3$ 和 YBa$_2$Cu$_3$O$_6$ 等代表性材料进行仿真验证。
AI.result: 成功展示了实空间局域磁振子模式的特征能量依赖性，包括磁振子从声学模式到光学模式的转变；揭示了在纳米尺度实空间中，即使在非周期条件下，每个自旋对关联在特定能量处伴随符号变化的局域磁振子模式。
AI.conclusion: 动态磁配对密度函数 $D_{\rm M}(r, E)$ 是一种独特的、用于研究局域磁动力学的新方法，能够提供传统 $S_{\rm M}(Q, E)$ 分析无法获得的实空间信息。

title: A unified formalism for collinear and non-collinear approaches in the four-component Dirac-Kohn-Sham theory based on G-spinors
summary: Non-collinear density functional theories were developed to extend the use of established collinear exchange-correlation functionals to systems with unpaired electrons in the presence of significant spin-orbit coupling. A comparison of different approaches and implementations is not straightforward, as the methods are often formulated using different fundamental variables and numerical approximations. A consistent review of the formal and numerical aspects of collinear and non-collinear schemes has recently been reported (Desmarais et al., J. Chem. Phys. 154, 204110 (2021)) in the context of two-component methods. In this work, we present an initial effort towards a unified formulation of collinear and non-collinear approximations, encompassing both canonical and Scalmani-Frisch schemes, within the relativistic four-component DKS formalism based on G-spinor basis sets. Our preliminary implementation of the collinear and canonical non-collinear formulations in the DKS module of the \texttt{BERTHA} code extends its applicability and provides a benchmark for a series of simple open-shell hydride molecules (namely, H$_2$X$^+$, with X = O, S, Se, Te, and Po). Finally, we show that incorporating the magnetisation vector into the reformulated non-collinear canonical LDA approach enables a description of H$_2$ dissociation - and open-shell systems more broadly - that closely parallels unrestricted non-relativistic approaches, notably without explicitly imposing the broken symmetry solution as is often required in non-relativistic collinear calculations. This unified formulation forms the basis for a rigorous comparison between different numerical approximations, which will be essential for obtaining stable results for the non-collinear GGA exchange-correlation functionals.

AI.tldr: 本文致力于在相对论四分量DKS框架下，统一规范和非规范非共线密度泛函理论（如collinear和Scalmani-Frisch方案），并通过BERTHA代码实现初步应用。在简单开壳氢化物（H₂X⁺, X=O, S, Se, Te, Po）上测试，发现引入磁化矢量的非共线规范LDA可描述H₂解离，无需强制破缺对称性，这与非相对论非限制方法一致。
AI.motivation: 现有非共线密度泛函方法在公式化和数值近似上存在差异，缺乏统一的比较框架。作者希望提出统一的公式，实现不同数值近似的严格对比，为稳定求解非共线GGA泛函奠定基础。
AI.method: 在相对论四分量DKS形式下，基于G-spinor基组，统一共线/非共线以及规范/非规范（Scalmani-Frisch）方案。在BERTHA代码的DKS模块中初步实现，并测试简单开壳氢化物（H₂X⁺）和H₂解离过程。
AI.result: 在H₂X⁺系列上提供基准结果；H₂解离中，非共线规范LDA方法通过磁化矢量实现与非相对论非限制方法接近的描述，无需显式破缺对称性。
AI.conclusion: 该统一公式为不同数值近似间的严格比较提供了基础，对非共线GGA泛函的稳定求解至关重要。

title: Hidden ordered compound-layer and its tailoring of the electronic/optical property in Ge2Sb2SexTe5-x alloys
summary: Ge2Sb2SexTe5-x (GSST) alloys represent an emerging class of phase-change materials for integrated photonics. However, the microscopic origins underlying their superior performance compared to the parent compound Ge2Sb2Te5 remain elusive. By using atomic simulations, this work elucidates that the thermal stability and low optical loss of GSST are fundamentally governed by the formation of an in-layer compound-like structure with SeTe2 or Se2Te stoichiometry depending on the Se content, contrasting to the previously believed pure-element-layered model where Se and Te atoms occupy separate layers inside GSST. The newly identified compound-layered structures maintaining stability at temperature above 370 K, yield an enlarged bandgap, weakened antibonding character, and more importantly, a moderate refractive index as well as decreased extinction coefficient which align better with the experiment compared to the previously believed model. The present findings not only help bridge the long-standing theory-experiment gap regarding the optical properties of GSST by redefining its atomic structure, but also establish local chemical ordering as a critical materials design principle for high-performance photonics.

AI.tldr: 通过原子模拟揭示GSST合金中SeTe2/Se2Te化合物层状结构取代传统纯元素分层模型，解释了其优异热稳定性和低光损耗的微观起源，弥合了理论与实验间的光学性质差异。
AI.motivation: GSST在集成光子学中性能优异，但其优于母体化合物Ge2Sb2Te5的微观机制一直不清楚，理论与实验之间存在长期分歧。
AI.method: 采用原子模拟方法，对比传统纯元素分层模型与新提出的化合物层状结构模型，分析Se含量对结构、热稳定性及光学性质的影响。
AI.result: 发现SeTe2或Se2Te化合物层状结构在370K以上稳定，具有更宽带隙、减弱的反键特性、适中的折射率和更低的消光系数，更符合实验数据。
AI.conclusion: 重新定义了GSST的原子结构，建立了局部化学有序性作为高性能光子学材料的关键设计原则。

title: Orientation-tunable correlated Chern insulating states in chiral twisted double bilayer graphene proximitized by WSe2
summary: Moire flat bands in graphene systems proximitized by transition-metal dichalcogenides (TMDCs) provide a setting where spin-orbit coupling (SOC) can reshape band topology. The crystallographic alignment angle twist angle between TMDC and graphene layers is predicted to tune the balance of Ising and Rashba SOC, but a combined theoretical and experimental understanding of how twist angle governs the topological character of correlated states has not been systematically established. Here we show that in chiral-stacked twisted double bilayer graphene in proximity to WSe2, twist angle between graphene and WSe2 determines the topological character of correlated Chern insulators. Continuum model calculations reveal that Ising spin-orbit coupling dominates at zero twist angle, giving rise to flat bands with finite valley Chern numbers, whereas Rashba coupling dominates at larger twist angle, resulting in topologically trivial bands. Transport measurements at quarter filling confirm this picture: twist angle = 0 deg devices exhibit C = +1 Chern insulators, consistent with spontaneous isospin polarization, whereas twist angle = 15 degree devices show C = 0 despite exhibiting similar correlated insulating behavior. The sharp contrast establishes crystallographic alignment as a new tuning knob, complementary to twist angle, displacement field, and carrier density, for engineering correlated topological states in van der Waals heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了过渡金属硫族化合物（TMDC）邻近诱导的石墨烯体系中的莫尔平带，发现石墨烯与WSe₂之间的扭转角决定了关联陈绝缘体的拓扑性质：零扭转角时Ising自旋-轨道耦合主导产生有限谷陈数平带，而大扭转角时Rashba耦合主导导致拓扑平庸带。输运测量确认了0°器件呈现C=+1陈绝缘体，15°器件呈现C=0，表明晶体学对准可作为调控关联拓扑态的新旋钮。
AI.motivation: 缺乏对扭转角如何系统调控TMDC/石墨烯体系中关联态拓扑性质的理论与实验综合理解。
AI.method: 结合连续模型计算与输运测量，研究手性堆叠扭转双层石墨烯邻近WSe₂体系中扭转角对关联陈绝缘体拓扑性质的影响。
AI.result: 零扭转角时Ising SOC主导，产生有限谷陈数平带，1/4填充时呈现C=+1陈绝缘体；15°扭转角时Rashba SOC主导，呈现拓扑平庸带（C=0）。
AI.conclusion: 晶体学对准（扭转角）可作为调控范德华异质结中关联拓扑态的新自由度，与扭转角、位移场和载流子密度互补。

title: The exceptional origin of the strange metal and the LFL-HFL transition
summary: We propose an algebraic framework for the strange metal regime of strongly correlated electrons. We show that the exceptional superconformal algebra $D(2,1;α)$ admits two distinct contractions of its conformal sector: one to a pair of canonical fermions, the underlying degrees of freedom of the Landau-Fermi liquid (LFL), and one to the algebra of Hubbard operators, which characterise a distinct metallic regime, the Hubbard-Fermi liquid (HFL). We argue that competition between these two metallic states drives the emergence of the strange metal as a $0+1$D superconformal bath. We analyse the resulting thermodynamics, and obtain a parameter-free prediction, $4π^2γ^{-1} =χ_s^{-1} + χ_c^{-1}$, relating the Sommerfeld coefficient to the static spin and charge susceptibilities. We further show that the LFL-HFL transition is discontinuous at low temperature, owing to a degeneracy at the emergence of the HFL, and map out the resulting phase diagram. We connect the framework to microscopic lattice models and to the phenomenology of correlated insulators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个代數框架，利用超共形代數 $D(2,1;α)$ 描述奇異金屬態。該代數可收縮為兩類：一類對應朗道-費米液體（LFL）的 canonical 費米子，另一類對應 Hubbard 算符代數，表徵 Hubbard-費米液體（HFL）。兩者競爭驅動奇異金屬作為 $0+1$D 超共形浴出現。論文推導了熱力學，得到無參數預測 $4π^2γ^{-1} =χ_s^{-1} + χ_c^{-1}$，並發現低溫下 LFL-HFL 轉變是不連續的。
AI.motivation: 強關聯電子體系中的奇異金屬態長期缺乏統一的理論框架，傳統的朗道-費米液體理論無法解釋其非費米液體行為（如線性電阻等）。作者旨在建立一個基於超共形代數的嚴格代數語言，以刻畫奇異金屬的宏觀現象。
AI.method: 採用超共形代數 $D(2,1;α)$ 的收縮（contraction）技巧：分別構造收縮到朗道-費米液體（LFL）的費米子代數，以及收縮到 Hubbard 算符代數（HFL）。通過分析這兩種金屬態的競爭，推導出 $0+1$D 超共形浴表徵的奇異金屬，並計算其熱力學性質，建立相圖。
AI.result: 得到無參數預測的 Sommerfeld 係數與自旋、電荷磁化率的關係 $4π^2γ^{-1} =χ_s^{-1} + χ_c^{-1}$；發現低溫下 LFL-HFL 轉變由於 HFL 出現時的簡併性而為一級相變（不連續轉變）；繪製出相圖並與微觀晶格模型及關聯絕緣體現象建立聯繫。
AI.conclusion: 該代數框架為奇異金屬態提供了嚴格的理論基礎，統一描述了 LFL、HFL 和奇異金屬之間的關係。所得無參數預測可被後續實驗檢驗，而 LFL-HFL 間的一級相變揭示了強關聯體系中金屬-金屬轉變的本質。該框架也為連結微觀模型與宏觀現象學提供了橋樑。

title: A harmonically-coupled-anharmonic-oscillator approach for polyatomic chemistry modeling in DSMC
summary: Atmospheric entry processes are characterized by high-enthalpy gas flows in strong thermo-chemical non-equilibrium. Accurate simulations of such conditions remain challenging due to the extreme conditions and the complex influence of internal energy modes. In particular, the common assumption of uncoupled harmonic vibrations may break down, and excited internal energy states can directly influence reaction rates. Previously, an anharmonic oscillator model has been developed by Civrais et al. to improve the accuracy of the Direct Simulation Monte Carlo (DSMC) method under such conditions. However, this extension has so far been limited to diatomic molecules. To increase the accuracy of the DSMC method in the open-source code PICLas, the anharmonic oscillator model is extended to include polyatomic species. The proposed model explicitly considers anharmonic effects and intramolecular energy redistribution. Vibrational degrees of freedom are treated in a local mode basis, in which anharmonic stretching modes are harmonically coupled by harmonic bending modes. The coupling allows for the redistribution of localized vibrational excitation. Dissociation can occur by the strong excitation of a stretching mode, and specific modes can be coupled to the reaction coordinate of the transition state in bimolecular exchange reactions. The newly developed model is evaluated by the comparison to high-fidelity calculations for a set of representative processes. Investigated are different dissociation reactions, which exhibit a high degree of energy redistribution, and the hydrogen-exchange reaction between methane and a hydrogen radical, in which only selected modes contribute to the reactive process. In addition, the recombination-dissociation equilibrium system has been investigated for methane.

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了非谐振子模型至多原子分子，用于DSMC方法中高焓大气进入条件的模拟，通过局部模式基组处理振动自由度，实现了非谐效应和分子内能量再分布的显式建模，并通过解离反应、氢交换反应及重组-解离平衡系统进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 大气进入过程涉及强热化学非平衡的高焓气体流动，精确模拟极具挑战。常用假设（非耦合谐振振动）在此条件下可能失效，激发态内能模式直接影响反应速率。已有的非谐振子模型仅限双原子分子，需扩展至多原子分子以提高DSMC方法精度。
AI.method: 将非谐振子模型扩展至多原子分子（如甲烷），采用局部模式基组处理振动自由度：非谐伸缩模式与谐振弯曲模式通过谐波耦合，实现局部振动激发的能量再分布。解离通过伸缩模式的强激发实现，特定模式可耦合到双分子交换反应的过渡态反应坐标。
AI.result: 通过与高保真计算对比评估新模型，研究了不同解离反应（展现高能量再分布程度）以及甲烷与氢自由基之间的氢交换反应（仅特定模式参与反应过程），还研究了甲烷的重组-解离平衡系统。
AI.conclusion: 该多原子非谐振子模型显著提升了DSMC方法在复杂大气进入条件下模拟多原子分子热化学非平衡过程的准确性，为高温气体动力学提供了更可靠的数值工具。

title: High-Mobility and High-Reliability Top-Gate Oxide Semiconductor Transistors by Oxygen Engineering
summary: In this work, we investigate the role of oxygen (O) on the performance of top-gate (TG) atomic-layer-deposited (ALD) oxide semiconductor transistors. The results reveal distinct defect characteristics and positive bias temperature instability (PBTI) degradation mechanisms between oxygen-rich (O-rich) and oxygen-deficient (O-poor) devices. It is found that an O-rich device fabrication process followed by O-free annealing can effectively achieve TG indium-rich (In-rich) oxide semiconductor transistors with high mobility, high reliability and high stability in hydrogen environment because O-rich process can suppress oxygen vacancies and their interaction with hydrogen, while O-free annealing plays a critical role in minimizing the formation of O-rich defects such as oxygen dimers (O-O bonds). Consequently, TG In-rich transistors with high mobility, steep subthreshold slope, and high PBTI reliability at high temperature are demonstrated. The understanding of O-rich defects provides a new insight to overcome the mobility-stability trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了氧含量对顶栅原子层沉积氧化物半导体晶体管性能的影响，发现富氧工艺结合无氧退火可以同时实现高迁移率、高可靠性和高稳定性，克服了迁移率-稳定性之间的权衡难题。
AI.motivation: 探索氧元素在顶栅氧化物半导体晶体管中的作用机制，旨在解决迁移率与稳定性之间的固有矛盾。
AI.method: 对比富氧与贫氧器件，采用富氧工艺+无氧退火的组合策略，通过抑制氧空位及其与氢的相互作用，同时减少富氧缺陷（如O-O二聚体）的形成。
AI.result: 实现了顶栅富铟氧化物半导体晶体管的高迁移率、陡峭亚阈值摆幅以及高温下的高PBTI可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 对富氧缺陷的理解为克服迁移率-稳定性权衡提供了新思路，富氧工艺+无氧退火是优化器件性能的有效策略。

title: Hodge Topology of Semiclassical Transport: A Coordinate-Free Geometric Framework for the Anomalous Hall Effect and Non-Linear Berry Dipole
summary: We establish a coordinate-free differential geometric framework for anomalous transport in topological bands using the Hodge-de Rham decomposition of the Brillouin zone. Standard formulations face mathematical singularities (Dirac strings) when using the quantum Berry connection in bands with non-zero Chern numbers. Applying this decomposition to the Berry curvature 2-form isolates the quantized topological monopole flux from a globally smooth geometric 1-form proxy potential, $\mathcal{A}$. Substituting this regularized potential into semiclassical transport integrals yields distinct analytical advantages. For linear transverse transport, our cohomological decomposition enables an exact geometric derivation of Haldane's insight via the co-area formula, partitioning the response into a continuous Fermi sea topological background and a localized Fermi surface geometric line integral. For non-linear transport, this globally smooth proxy unifies the geometric description, reproducing the high numerical stability of scalar integration-by-parts techniques directly from its exact sector, accommodating arbitrary Chern numbers. By enforcing the continuous Coulomb-Hodge gauge ($δ\mathcal{A} = 0$) alongside vanishing harmonic holonomies over fundamental 1-cycles ($\oint_{γ_i} \mathcal{A} = 0$), we map the Hodge potential $\mathcal{A}$ to the Maximally Localized Wannier Function (MLWF) gauge in trivial bands, providing a non-singular computational proxy for topologically obstructed bands. Finally, we analytically demonstrate that solving the Hodge Laplacian for $\mathcal{A}$ zeroes the macroscopic Brillouin zone average (uniform $\mathbf{R}=0$ zero-mode) topological divergence, yielding a mathematically consistent covariant formulation that matches the algorithmic robustness of standard methods against discrete $\mathbf{k}$-grid noise.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Hodge-de Rham分解建立了一个无坐标依赖的微分几何框架，用于处理拓扑带中的反常输运。该方法通过将Berry曲率2-形式分解，分离出量子化的拓扑磁单极通量和全局光滑的几何1-形式代理势$\mathcal{A}$，解决了标准公式中Dirac弦的数学奇异性问题。在线性输运中，通过上同调分解实现了Haldane洞察的精确几何推导；在非线性输运中，该代理势统一了几何描述并具有高数值稳定性。通过连续Coulomb-Hodge规范和平滑谐和全纯条件，将Hodge势$\mathcal{A}$映射到最大局域Wannier函数规范，为拓扑阻塞带提供了非奇异的计算代理。最后证明，求解Hodge Laplacian可消除宏观Brillouin区平均拓扑发散，形成与标准方法相当的协变公式。
AI.motivation: 标准公式在使用量子Berry联络处理非零Chern数的拓扑带时存在数学奇异性（Dirac弦），需要建立更优雅的无坐标微分几何框架来统一描述拓扑带中的反常输运现象。
AI.method: 采用Hodge-de Rham分解将Berry曲率2-形式分解为拓扑磁单极通量和全局光滑的1-形式代理势$\mathcal{A}$；应用连续Coulomb-Hodge规范（$\delta\mathcal{A}=0$）和平滑谐和全纯条件（$\oint_{\gamma_i}\mathcal{A}=0$）；通过Hodge Laplacian求解消除宏观拓扑发散。
AI.result: 在线性输运中通过上同调分解和co-area公式实现了Haldane洞察的精确几何推导；在非线性输运中统一了几何描述并达到与标量分部积分技术相当的高数值稳定性；将Hodge势映射到MLWF规范提供了非奇异的计算代理；求解Hodge Laplacian消除了均匀$\mathbf{R}=0$零模拓扑发散。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了处理拓扑带中反常输运的无坐标数学公式，通过Hodge分解消除了标准方法中的奇异性问题，在数值稳定性和计算一致性上可与标准方法媲美，为拓扑阻塞带提供了理论上优雅且计算上鲁棒的新途径。

title: An Additive Reference Correction Scheme for the Transcorrelated Method
summary: We introduce an additive reference correction for the transcorrelated (TC) method and its three-body mean-field approximation (xTC), to improve energy differences computed in small orbital basis sets. The correction is motivated by the observation that, for xTC atomization energies, the dominant error in double-ζ bases originates from the reference contribution rather than from the correlation energy. In the proposed reference-corrected scheme (RC-xTC), the small-basis correlation energy is retained, while the corresponding TC reference energy is replaced by its value from a larger basis. Benchmark calculations for the non-relativistic HEAT set with the Dunning basis-set family show that RC-xTC substantially improves both total and atomization energies relative to standard xTC in double-ζ bases. At the CCSD(T) level, RC-xTC yields better atomization energies than CCSD(T)-F12a in the double-ζ regime, while preserving the favorable total-energy accuracy of xTC. At the CCSD level, RC-xTC improves atomization energies relative to F12a throughout the full basis-set sequence. As the basis set is enlarged, xTC and RC-xTC become progressively identical, as expected from the construction of the correction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种加性参考校正（RC-xTC），用于改善小基组下 transcorrelated (TC) 方法及其三体平均场近似 (xTC) 的能量差计算。通过在双ζ基组下用大基组的参考能量替代小基组的参考能量，保留小基组的相关能，显著提升了总能量和原子化能精度，在 CCSD(T) 级别优于 CCSD(T)-F12a，在 CCSD 级别全面超越 F12a。
AI.motivation: 作者发现 xTC 方法在双ζ基组下的原子化能误差主要来源于参考贡献（reference contribution）而非相关能（correlation energy），因此有必要针对参考能进行校正。
AI.method: 提出 RC-xTC 方案：在小基组（如双ζ）中计算相关能，而将 TC 参考能量替换为来自更大基组的参考能量值，实现加性参考校正。
AI.result: 在非相对论 HEAT 基准集上，使用 Dunning 基组系列测试，RC-xTC 在双ζ基组下显著改进了总能量和原子化能。CCSD(T) 级别下 RC-xTC 的原子化能优于 CCSD(T)-F12a；CCSD 级别下在整个基组序列上均优于 F12a。随基组增大，xTC 与 RC-xTC 逐渐趋于一致。
AI.conclusion: RC-xTC 是一种简单有效的校正策略，能在小基组下大幅提升 xTC 的能量精度，且随着基组完备化自然还原为标准 xTC 方法。

title: Symmetry-Enforced Ferroelectric Switching of Two-Dimensional Altermagnetism
summary: Altermagnetism features strong momentum-dependent spin splitting despite zero net magnetization, offering a transformative platform for next-generation spintronics. However, the nonvolatile and deterministic switching between its two equivalent spin-splitting states remains a fundamental bottleneck. Here, we propose a universal layer-engineering paradigm to achieve symmetry-enforced ferroelectric switching of two-dimensional altermagnetism. By sandwiching a conventional antiferromagnetic monolayer between two identical ferroelectric layers, the out-of-plane polarization cleanly breaks the spatial symmetry to induce robust altermagnetic splitting. Crucially, the global combined parity-time symmetry dictates that reversing the ferroelectric polarization exactly inverts the altermagnetic spin-splitting pattern. We rigorously validate this mechanism in the In2Se3/MnPTe3/In2Se3 trilayer using first-principles calculations. As a direct consequence, the ferroelectrically driven spin-splitting reversal deterministically flips the anomalous Hall effect signal, providing an unambiguous transport fingerprint to electrically distinguish the two altermagnetic states. Unconstrained by the stringent symmetry requirements of intrinsic single-phase materials, our findings establish a versatile physical framework for electrically addressable altermagnetic spintronics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种层工程范 paradigm，通过将常规反铁磁单层夹在两个相同铁电层之间，实现二维交变磁性的对称性增强铁电开关，并通过第一性原理计算在In2Se3/MnPTe3/In2Se3三层结构中验证了该机制，实现了自旋分裂模式的倒转及反常霍尔效应的确定性翻转。
AI.motivation: 交变磁性具有零净磁化下强动量依赖的自旋分裂，为下一代自旋电子学提供了变革平台，但其两个等价自旋分裂态之间的非易失性和确定性开关一直是一个根本性瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出层工程范式：将反铁磁单层夹在两个相同铁电层之间，利用面外极化破缺空间对称性诱导交变磁性分裂，并通过全局组合宇称-时间对称性实现铁电极化反转与自旋分裂模式倒转的耦合。采用第一性原理计算在In2Se3/MnPTe3/In2Se3三层结构中进行验证。
AI.result: 成功验证了铁电驱动的自旋分裂倒转可确定性翻转反常霍尔效应信号，提供了电学区分两种交变磁性态的无歧运输指纹。
AI.conclusion: 该发现不受固有单相材料严格对称性要求的限制，建立了一个通用的物理框架，用于电可寻址的交变磁性自旋电子学。

title: Contrastive Regularization of Machine Learning Potentials
summary: Machine learning interatomic potentials are trained to predict energies and forces but built to be sampled: their purpose is to drive molecular simulations whose observables average over the equilibrium distribution the potential defines. They exemplify a broader AI problem -- learned regressors deployed as generators -- where pointwise accuracy does not guarantee a correct distribution. We show that potentials trained by standard Mean Squared Error (MSE) minimization on Density Functional Theory (DFT) data can reach chemical accuracy on held-out data, yet still fail as samplers: their trajectories drift into spurious low-energy minima and return thermodynamic observables that depart sharply from the reference. To correct this, we introduce Contrastive Regularized MSE (CRMSE), a post-training step that augments the MSE with a contrastive term derived from the Kullback--Leibler divergence between the potential's implicit Boltzmann distribution and the target. The network serves as its own energy-based model: persistent Langevin chains expose the configurations it drifts into and raise their energy, adding no new ab initio data. On the ethanol and aspirin molecules of the MD17 dataset, CRMSE confines the sampler to the physical basin and recovers the energy distribution, interatomic-distance distributions, and dihedral free-energy profiles to near-quantitative agreement with DFT, while preserving force accuracy and keeping energy errors within chemical accuracy; it remains effective when the training set is sharply reduced. That MSE training fails this way on MD17 -- one of the most widely used benchmarks -- while a minimal contrastive correction repairs it suggests that reliable sampling depends less on data volume than on training the model against the distribution it produces: distribution-level training is not a refinement of regression accuracy, but a distinct requirement.

AI.tldr: 论文发现用MSE训练的机器学习原子间势能即使达到化学精度，在分子模拟中仍会采样失败（漂移到虚假低能态）。作者提出对比正则化MSE（CRMSE），通过KL散度对比项修正玻尔兹曼分布，无需额外DFT数据即可恢复正确的热力学观测值。
AI.motivation: 标准MSE训练只关注逐点能量/力精度，但势能函数的真正用途是作为采样器驱动分子动力学模拟。点级准确度无法保证模型定义的正确平衡分布，导致模拟时出现虚假低能态和错误热力学量。
AI.method: 提出CRMSE（Contrastive Regularized MSE），在MSE损失后增加一个对比正则化项，该项来源于势能模型隐式玻尔兹曼分布与目标分布之间的KL散度。利用持久朗之万链暴露模型漂移的区域并提高其能量，无需新增第一性原理数据。
AI.result: 在MD17数据集的乙醇和阿司匹林分子上，CRMSE将采样约束在物理盆地，能量分布、原子间距离分布、二面角自由能曲线与DFT近定量一致，同时保持力精度和化学精度。即使在训练集大幅缩减时仍然有效。
AI.conclusion: MSE在MD17上的采样失败说明：可靠采样不取决于数据量，而取决于针对模型自身生成分布的训练。分布级训练不是回归精度的提升，而是一个独立需求。

title: Kinetic Monte Carlo-Ising Machine Optimization for Atomistic Inverse Design of Solid Electrolytes
summary: Maximizing ionic conductivity remains a fundamental challenge in the atomistic design of solid electrolytes. To this end, we present a framework that combines kinetic Monte Carlo (KMC) and factorization machine with quadratic-optimization annealing (FMQA), an Ising-machine-based black-box optimization algorithm for large-scale combinatorial optimization. KMC evaluates the ionic conductivity for a given dopant configuration, whereas FMQA iteratively learns a surrogate model from a small configuration-conductivity dataset and proposes configurations expected to maximize conductivity. To address the severe combinatorial explosion in large KMC simulation cells, we partition the configuration space for parallel optimization. As a proof of concept, we apply this KMC-FMQA framework to bulk 8 mol % yttria-stabilized zirconia, identifying a dopant configuration with an order-of-magnitude higher conductivity than that of random configurations and the experimentally reported conductivity. Combined with experiments, this framework will enable the determination of microscopic structures from measured conductivity, providing insight into the underlying transport mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合动力学蒙特卡洛（KMC）与基于伊辛机的因子分解机二次退火（FMQA）优化算法，用于发现固体电解质中可最大化离子电导率的掺杂构型，并以氧化钇稳定氧化锆为实例验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在固体电解质的原子尺度设计中，如何最大化离子电导率仍是一个根本性挑战，现有方法难以高效搜索巨大的组合空间以找到最优掺杂构型。
AI.method: 将动力学蒙特卡洛（KMC）用于评估给定掺杂构型的离子电导率，并采用因子分解机二次退火（FMQA）这一基于伊辛机的黑箱优化算法，从小规模构型-电导率数据集中迭代学习代理模型，预测能最大化电导率的构型。为应对大尺度KMC仿真单元中的组合爆炸问题，对构型空间进行了分区并行优化。
AI.result: 在8 mol%氧化钇稳定氧化锆上，该方法识别出的掺杂构型其电导率比随机构型和实验报道值高出一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该框架结合实验后，可从测得的电导率反推微观结构，揭示潜在的离子传输机制，为固体电解质的高通量设计提供了新途径。

title: High-harmonic spin-current signatures of altermagnetic spin-group symmetry
summary: Spin point groups classify magnetic phases in the weak spin-orbit coupling regime and characterize the static properties of altermagnetic phases, but their dynamical consequences remain largely unexplored. Here, we derive selection rules for high-harmonic generation of charge and spin currents by extending dynamical symmetry to include spin point group operations. Since spin currents transform under both real and spin space operations, whereas charge currents transform only under real space operations, spin current selection rules can reveal magnetic information that is inaccessible to charge current harmonics. In a minimal altermagnetic model, an axis-aligned linearly polarized drive is non-diagnostic for distinguishing ferromagnetic and altermagnetic phases, although the antiferromagnetic phase is distinguished by the absence of the corresponding spin-current harmonics. A diagonal linearly polarized drive distinguishes the three SPG phases within the weak-SOC spin-group description, whereas a single-helicity circularly polarized drive provides a sharper spin-current-harmonic criterion for distinguishing them from magnetic-point-group mimics. These results establish spin current harmonics as a dynamical probe of spin group symmetry.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了自旋点群操作下的高次谐波产生选择定则，发现自旋电流谐波可揭示电荷电流无法获取的磁信息，并在线性和圆偏振光驱动下区分了弱自旋-轨道耦合区域的不同自旋点群磁相（铁磁、反铁磁、交变磁）。
AI.motivation: 自旋点群能分类弱自旋-轨道耦合下的磁相并刻画交变磁相的静态性质，但其动力学后果尚未被探索。
AI.method: 将动力学对称性扩展到包含自旋点群操作，推导电荷/自旋电流高次谐波的选择定则；在最小交变磁模型中对比不同偏振方向驱动下的谐波特征。
AI.result: (1) 轴对齐线偏振光无法区分铁磁和交变磁相，但反铁磁相可通过自旋电流谐波的缺失区分；(2) 对角偏振光可区分三种自旋点群相；(3) 单螺旋圆偏振光提供更清晰的自旋电流谐波判据，可区分自旋点群相与磁点群模拟相。
AI.conclusion: 自旋电流谐波可作为自旋群对称性的动力学探针，为弱自旋-轨道耦合磁相识别提供新工具。

title: Visualizing the Hidden Architecture of Molecular Films with Phase-Resolved Rotational SFG Microscopy
summary: The highly variable physico-chemical properties of thin molecular films play an essential role in numerous research fields ranging from biophysics to the fabrication of functional devices such as molecular sensors. The properties of molecular films are largely governed by their three-dimensional molecular structure which often exhibits important spatial heterogeneity, either naturally, or introduced deliberately. In order to understand and control these properties microscopic insight into structural parameters such as composition, molecular orientation and conformation, as well as molecular order is required, which, so far, represents a mostly unachieved experimental target. In this contribution we present a powerful experimental approach that can overcome this limitation. Using phase-resolved rotational sum-frequency generation (SFG) microscopy all of these structural parameters can be obtained with sub-monolayer sensitivity and at sub-micron resolution. In measurements of monolayer assemblies of mixed phospholipids, we uncover the molecular packing structure in previously-unattained detail and demonstrate the large potential of the technique for the elucidation of the complex architecture inside molecular films. The structural insight provided by this nonlinear microscopy approach spans all the way from the molecular to the macroscopic scale opening the door to a completely new type of interfacial studies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相位分辨旋转和频产生（SFG）显微镜的方法，能够以亚单层灵敏度和亚微米分辨率，同时获取分子薄膜的组成、取向、构象和有序度等三维结构参数，突破了传统实验技术的限制。
AI.motivation: 分子薄膜的物化性质高度依赖于其三维分子结构，但该结构常存在空间异质性。目前缺乏能够以微观尺度同时获取组成、分子取向、构象和有序度等多种结构参数的实验手段，这限制了对薄膜性质的理解与控制。
AI.method: 采用相位分辨旋转和频产生（SFG）显微镜技术，在亚单层灵敏度和亚微米分辨率下，对混合磷脂单分子层组装体进行测量，解析分子堆积结构。
AI.result: 成功以前所未有的细节揭示了混合磷脂单分子层中的分子堆积结构，证明了该技术能够在从分子到宏观尺度上提供完整的结构信息。
AI.conclusion: 这种非线性显微方法能够跨越从分子到宏观尺度的结构洞察，为界面研究开辟了全新的途径，有望在生物物理和功能器件（如分子传感器）等领域发挥重要作用。

title: Three-phonon mixing as a source of light-induced chirality
summary: Mid- and far-infrared optical pulses have found wide applicability in experiments in which collective modes of solids are driven nonlinearly, as a means to manipulate functional properties of materials on ultrafast time scales. In the illustrative case of boron phosphate (BPO$_4$), mid-infrared excitation has been used to induce chirality in an otherwise achiral crystal. The pump frequency dependence of photo-induced chirality reveals that, while on-resonance excitation is understood in terms of the well-documented phonon rectification from two-phonon mixing, additional pathways become relevant when the pump pulse is detuned from resonance. We find that a three-mode mixing mechanism becomes important in this case, whereas the contributions from other impulsive Raman terms are negligible. The results reported here provide a quantitative foundation for nonlinear phononic lineshapes in transparent materials, and open up new opportunities for lattice control.

AI.tldr: 本文研究BPO₄晶体中红外光激发诱导手性的非线性声子机制，发现共振激发时由双声子混合主导，而非共振激发时三模混合机制变得重要，其他拉曼项可忽略。
AI.motivation: 理解中远红外脉冲驱动固体集体模式、操控材料功能性质的物理机制，特别是非共振激发下的非线性声子过程。
AI.method: 通过改变泵浦频率，系统研究BPO₄中光致手性随频率的变化关系，区分共振与非共振激发下的不同路径贡献。
AI.result: 共振激发可归因于双声子混合的声子整流效应；非共振激发时三模混合机制变得重要，而其他脉冲拉曼项贡献可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 研究为透明材料中非线性声子谱线形状提供了定量基础，为晶格操控开辟了新可能。

title: Topological zero-reflection points in multi-terminal quantum wire junctions
comment: 15 pages, 1 table, 7 figures. Comments are welcome
summary: We study scattering in noninteracting multi-terminal quantum wire junctions and show that junctions with dihedral symmetry can exhibit exact zero-reflection points for $N \ge 4$ terminals. By analyzing the scattering matrix, we identify these reflectionless points in the $(E,t')$ parameter space, where $E$ is the incident particle energy and $t'$ is the junction hopping amplitude. These points exhibit an even-odd dependence on $N$ and converge asymptotically to a common limiting value in the large-$N$ limit. We show that the reflectionless points are characterized by an integer winding number associated with the phase of the reflection amplitude, providing a topological description for their stability against weak on-site disorder. We also consider junctions with broken time-reversal symmetry and find that a magnetic flux can induce additional reflectionless points, including for the $N = 3$ case. For a four-terminal junction threaded by a $π$-flux, we identify a unique parameter regime in which the reflection amplitude vanishes over the entire energy band. Finally, we discuss experimental signatures through the behavior of Friedel oscillations and examine the stability of these reflectionless points in the presence of weak interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究非相互作用多端量子线结中的散射问题，发现具有二面体对称性的结在N≥4时存在精确的零反射点。通过散射矩阵分析识别这些无反射点，展示其奇偶依赖性和大N极限行为，并发现这些点具有拓扑保护性，对弱无序稳定。引入磁通可诱导额外无反射点，包括N=3的情况。在π磁通四端结中发现反射振幅在全能带内消失的参数区。最后讨论了Friedel振荡的实验信号和弱相互作用下的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 理解多端量子线结中的散射特性，特别是探索具有对称性的结中是否可以实现完全无反射的传输状态，以及这些状态的拓扑性质和稳定性。
AI.method: 通过散射矩阵分析，在能量E和结跃迁振幅t'的参数空间中识别零反射点；利用缠绕数进行拓扑描述；引入磁通破坏时间反演对称性进行扩展；结合Friedel振荡和弱相互作用分析实验可观测性。
AI.result: 发现N≥4时存在零反射点，具有奇偶依赖性和大N极限收敛行为；这些点由反射振幅相位缠绕数表征，对弱无序稳定；磁通可诱导N=3等额外无反射点；π磁通四端结中反射振幅在全能带消失。
AI.conclusion: 多端量子线结中的零反射点具有拓扑起源和稳定性的重要特性，可通过磁通调控，并在实验上通过Friedel振荡观测，为量子输运调控提供了新途径。

title: Conical Intersections Enable Ultrafast Molecular Spin Control in a Chromium Complex
summary: Molecular spintronics seeks to control spin states in single molecules for ultrafast switching and efficient information processing. Transition metal complexes are promising candidates for such applications due to their modular ligand fields, diverse spin configurations, and potential for spin-vibronic coupling that facilitates rapid spin dynamics. Chromium(III) complexes, in particular, offer long-lived emissive doublet states and chemical robustness, making them attractive for room-temperature spin control. Here we investigate the spin-state dynamics of tris(2,4-pentanedionato)chromium(III), [Cr(acac)3], a photochemically stable d3 complex with minimal vibrational congestion. Using ultrafast transient grating and two dimensional electronic spectroscopy with ~10 fs resolution, we directly probe vibrational and electronic dynamics associated with the 4T2 -> 2E intersystem crossing (ISC). These measurements reveal coherent vibrational modes implicated in mediating nonadiabatic spin transitions. Complementary theoretical modelling shows that vibronic coupling and spin orbit interactions promote the formation of multiple conical intersections, providing ultrafast channels for spin-flip dynamics. Metal-ligand bending and stretching modes serve as tuning and coupling coordinates, enabling ISC despite weak spin-orbit coupling in 3d transition metal. Our study provides mechanistic insight into spin-vibronic dynamics in Cr(III) complexes and establishes a design framework for achieving ultrafast molecular spin switching, advancing the development of optically addressable spin centres for future spintronic and quantum technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文利用超快瞬态光栅和二维电子光谱（~10飞秒分辨率）研究了[Cr(acac)3]配合物中4T2→2E系间窜越的自旋-振动动力学，揭示了振动相干模介导的非绝热自旋翻转通道，并建立了实现超快分子自旋开关的设计框架。
AI.motivation: 分子自旋电子学需要控制单分子中的自旋态以实现超快开关和信息处理，而过渡金属配合物因可调的配体场、多样的自旋构型和自旋-振动耦合潜力而成为有前景的候选体系。Cr(III)配合物具有长寿命发射双重态和化学稳定性，适合室温自旋控制，但其自旋态动力学的微观机制尚不清晰。
AI.method: 采用超快瞬态光栅（transient grating）和二维电子光谱（2DES），时间分辨率约10飞秒，直接探测与4T2→2E系间窜越相关的振动和电子动力学。同时结合理论建模分析振动耦合和自旋-轨道相互作用如何促进多个圆锥交叉点的形成。
AI.result: 实验揭示了介导非绝热自旋跃迁的相干振动模；理论表明振动耦合和自旋-轨道相互作用促进了多个圆锥交叉点的产生，为自旋翻转提供了超快通道。金属-配体弯曲和伸缩模式分别作为调谐坐标和耦合坐标，使得即使在3d过渡金属的弱自旋-轨道耦合下也能实现系间窜越。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为Cr(III)配合物中的自旋-振动动力学提供了机理见解，建立了实现超快分子自旋开关的设计框架，推动了用于未来自旋电子学和量子技术的光学可寻址自旋中心的发展。

title: Ultrafast magnetization induced by linearly polarized pulses is widespread in nonmagnetic semiconductors
summary: Ultrafast optical on-off switching of magnetic order promises near-petahertz information processing. Recently, it has been proposed that non-magnetic semiconductors with narrow band edges or strong exchange interactions could display ultrafast magnetization when photoexcited with linearly polarized femtoseconds pulses, but the experimental detection of this effect remains a challenge, mostly for the lack of suitable candidate compounds. Here, we present a high-throughput first-principles screening of the MC3D database of experimentally known inorganic crystals, identifying nearly 440 non-magnetic semiconductors that develop spin polarization under photoexcitation with linearly polarized pulses via a light-induced exchange-driven instability. We determine how the crystal field environment and band-edge orbital character govern the magnitude and the type of magnetic order of the photoinduced state and we unveil systematic chemical and periodic trends that provide intuitive guidance for materials selection. Our results argue that on-off switching of magnetization with linearly polarized femtosecond pulses is a widespread occurrence in non-magnetic semiconductors, opening novel avenues for experimental verification and application.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高通量第一性原理筛选，从非磁性半导体数据库中识别出近440种材料，能在线性偏振飞秒脉冲光激发下产生自旋极化，实现超快磁光开关，并揭示了晶体场环境与能带边缘轨道特性对光致磁性的影响规律。
AI.motivation: 光控磁性开关有望实现近拍赫兹信息处理，但此前缺乏合适的候选材料，实验检测困难。
AI.method: 对MC3D数据库中实验已知的无机晶体进行高通量第一性原理筛选，分析晶体场环境和能带边缘轨道特征对光致磁性的影响。
AI.result: 发现近440种非磁性半导体在线性偏振光激发下可产生自旋极化，并揭示了化学和周期规律。
AI.conclusion: 线性偏振飞秒脉冲光在非磁性半导体中实现磁化开关是一种普遍现象，为实验验证和应用开辟了新途径。

title: Beating micromagnetic limits on skyrmion stability by long-range frustration
summary: Skyrmion stability is commonly assumed to scale with skyrmion size or exchange stiffness within micromagnetic models. Here, we demonstrate that long-range exchange frustration can break this paradigm, enhancing the collapse energy barrier without increasing skyrmion size or magnetic energy scale. By mapping the continuum model onto a spin-lattice Hamiltonian, we find that skyrmions with identical micromagnetic parameters can exhibit significantly different energy barriers, depending on their underlying atomistic exchange interactions. We attribute this behavior to saddle point textures, whose pronounced noncollinearity captures long-range frustration beyond the micromagnetic approximation. We further develop an exchange optimization framework to predict that long-range frustration can double the energy barrier in physically realistic conditions, possibly valid for ultrathin films or van der Waals magnets. These results hold across different lattice symmetries, revealing an intrinsic limitation of micromagnetics and establishing long-range frustration engineering as a promising route toward highly stable nanoscale skyrmions.

AI.tldr: 本文发现长程交换失谐可以打破传统微磁学中斯格明子稳定性与尺寸或交换刚度的正比关系，通过自旋晶格模型证明在相同微磁参数下，不同原子级交换相互作用可导致显著不同的能量势垒，并建立交换优化框架将势垒提高一倍，为高稳定纳米斯格明子设计提供新思路。
AI.motivation: 传统微磁模型认为斯格明子稳定性与其尺寸或交换刚度成正比，但这种范式存在局限性，亟需探索突破该比例关系的机制以实现更稳定的纳米级斯格明子。
AI.method: 将连续介质模型映射到自旋晶格哈密顿量，通过对比鞍点织构的非共线特性捕获微磁近似之外的失谐效应，并发展交换优化框架预测势垒提升。
AI.result: 相同微磁参数的斯格明子因底层原子交换相互作用不同而呈现显著不同的能量势垒；长程失谐可在不增加尺寸或磁能标度的情况下将势垒提升一倍；不同晶格对称性下结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 长程交换失谐工程为制备高稳定纳米斯格明子提供了新途径，同时揭示了微磁学在处理此类体系时的固有限制。

title: Giant perpendicular Edelstein polarization in 2D compensated magnets via bichromatic Floquet driving
summary: While unconventional $p$-wave magnets can generate nonrelativistic Edelstein polarizations, spin-group symmetries strictly forbid these responses in unconventional magnets with higher-order harmonics, such as $d$-wave altermagnets. Here, we demonstrate that combining Rashba spin-orbit coupling with bichromatic Floquet driving activates giant perpendicular Edelstein polarizations (PEPs) across 2D altermagnets and broader classes of unconventional spin-polarized magnets -- a feat monochromatic driving cannot achieve. By dynamically breaking two-fold rotational symmetry, the two-frequency drive (including bilinear, bicircular, and circular-linear configurations) induces a stray-field-free in-plane Zeeman-like field that generates orbitally dominated PEPs (0.5--1.5 $μ_{\rm B}$). This massive response is governed by universal selection rules tied to the system's magnetic parity and the second beam's harmonics. These emergent PEPs provide a powerful mechanism for perpendicular memory writing.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，结合Rashba自旋轨道耦合与双色Floquet驱动（而非单色驱动），可在二维交错磁体等非常规自旋极化磁体中激活巨大的垂直Edelstein极化，其响应由轨道主导（0.5–1.5 μ_B），由磁宇称和第二束谐波的通用选择规则决定，为垂直磁存储写入提供了新机制。
AI.motivation: 传统p波磁体可产生非相对论性Edelstein极化，但更高阶谐波（如d波交错磁体）的非常规磁体受自旋群对称性严格禁止这种响应。作者希望突破这一对称性限制，在更广泛的非常规磁体中实现Edelstein极化。
AI.method: 将Rashba自旋轨道耦合与双色Floquet驱动（包括双线性、双圆极化和圆-线极化构型）结合，通过动态破缺二重旋转对称性，诱导无杂散场的面内类塞曼场，从而产生轨道主导的垂直Edelstein极化。
AI.result: 双色驱动可在二维交错磁体及更广泛的非常规自旋极化磁体中产生巨大的垂直Edelstein极化（0.5–1.5 μ_B），而单色驱动无法实现。该响应由轨道贡献主导，并受磁宇称和第二束激光谐波的通用选择规则调控。
AI.conclusion: 这种新生的垂直Edelstein极为垂直磁存储写入提供了强大机制，拓展了光控自旋在非常规磁体中的应用前景。

title: Resonant and collective modification of London dispersion interactions under vibrational strong coupling
summary: Experiments have shown that, by tuning a microcavity to resonance with a vibrational mode of the molecules contained within it, one can modify chemical properties, such as reaction rates. This gives rise to the exciting prospect of steering chemical reactivity, just by placing a pair of carefully spaced mirrors around the reaction mixture. However, a decade after the first demonstration, the mechanism behind this effect remains ill-understood. Here, we show how vibrational strong coupling can lead to resonant modification of vibrationally-resolved London dispersion interactions. Employing a mixed quantum-classical dynamics scheme, we then show how this in turn can give rise to resonant rate enhancement in the case of two molecules strongly coupled to the cavity mode, for all regimes of solvent friction. The resonant changes of the London dispersion interaction seem to persist when increasing the number of molecules. Whether this also leads to altered reaction rates in the experimentally relevant collective limit remains an open question, as this regime falls outside the range of applicability of our mixed quantum-classical dynamics approach. Nevertheless, the framework presented here offers an exciting new avenue to explore, and hopefully bring us a step closer towards explaining the mechanism behind vibropolaritonic chemistry.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了振动强耦合如何通过修正伦敦色散相互作用来影响化学反应速率，并采用混合量子-经典动力学方法展示了在溶剂摩擦各 regime 下的共振速率增强效应，但集体效应仍待探索。
AI.motivation: 实验表明微腔共振可改变化学性质（如反应速率），但其机制在过去十年中仍不清楚，本文旨在揭示振动强耦合影响化学反应的物理机制。
AI.method: 采用混合量子-经典动力学（mixed quantum-classical dynamics）方案，分析振动强耦合下伦敦色散相互作用的共振修正，并考察不同溶剂摩擦 regime 下的速率变化。
AI.result: 振动强耦合可导致伦敦色散相互作用的共振修正，进而引起两分子体系中反应速率的共振增强，该效应在所有溶剂摩擦 regime 下均成立；增加分子数时色散相互作用的变化仍然存在。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了振动强耦合通过伦敦色散相互作用影响反应速率的可能机制，为理解振动极化激元化学提供了新视角，但集体极限下的速率变化仍待进一步研究。

title: Photon Statistics from Yb3+-Doped CsPbCl3 are Inconsistent with Quantum Cutting
summary: CsPb(Cl1-xBrx)3:Yb3+ has been widely reported as a broadband quantum-cutting material with a photoluminescence quantum yield exceeding 100%, making it a promising candidate for enhancing the blue-green spectral response of silicon photovoltaics. Many groups have reproduced absolute photoluminescence quantum yields over 100%, but others have struggled to obtain such high values. Here, we test the quantum-cutting capabilities of CsPbCl3:Yb3+ nanocrystals and bulk material using photon-correlation analysis. A quantum-cutting material is expected to exhibit photon bunching, but our experiments on CsPbCl3:Yb3+ show no such behavior. In fact, we observe the opposite -- anti-bunching -- under focused-excitation conditions. This observation can be explained with the previously established Auger-quenching pathway in CsPbCl3:Yb3+. Our results thus confirm high-power Auger quenching but question earlier descriptions of quantum cutting in CsPb(Cl1-xBrx)3:Yb3+.

AI.tldr: 本文通过光子关联分析测试了CsPbCl3:Yb3+纳米晶和体材料的量子剪裁能力，发现其表现出反聚束而非预期的光子聚束行为，证实了高功率俄歇淬灭的存在，但对此前关于该材料量子剪裁的描述提出了质疑。
AI.motivation: CsPb(Cl1-xBrx)3:Yb3+被广泛报道为光致发光量子产率超过100%的宽带量子剪裁材料，有潜力提升硅光伏的蓝绿光谱响应，但不同研究组在重复实验时结果不一致，需要验证其真正的量子剪裁能力。
AI.method: 采用光子关联分析方法（photon-correlation analysis）对CsPbCl3:Yb3+纳米晶和体材料进行测试，检测其是否呈现量子剪裁材料预期的光子聚束（photon bunching）现象。
AI.result: 实验观察到CsPbCl3:Yb3+在聚焦激发条件下表现出反聚束（anti-bunching）行为，而非量子剪裁预期的光子聚束现象。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果可以用此前已建立的俄歇淬灭（Auger quenching）路径解释，证实了高功率下俄歇淬灭的存在，但对CsPb(Cl1-xBrx)3:Yb3+的量子剪裁描述提出了质疑。

title: Strain-Tunable Harmonic Responses in Valley-Polarized Bilayer Graphene
summary: We theoretically investigate the linear and second-order nonlinear optical responses of valley-polarized bilayer graphene under uniaxial strain. Employing a low-energy effective Hamiltonian that incorporates trigonal warping and strain-induced anisotropy, we calculate the optical susceptibilities within the quantum kinetic formalism. We show that, while the second-order response vanishes in valley-balanced bilayer graphene owing to the cancellation of contributions from opposite valleys, a finite valley polarization lifts this cancellation and enables a net second-harmonic generation (SHG) signal. Uniaxial strain substantially modifies the nonlinear response by distorting the low-energy electronic structure and altering the pseudospin texture, producing a highly anisotropic SHG spectrum. Pronounced resonant enhancements occur at photon energies $\hbarω\approx E_f$ and $\hbarω\approx 2E_f$, associated with two-photon and one-photon interband resonances, respectively. Remarkably, changing the sign of the strain parameter reverses the direction of the induced second-harmonic current, providing a mechanically controlled switching mechanism for nonlinear optical transport. These results establish strain engineering as an effective route for manipulating valley-dependent nonlinear optical phenomena in bilayer graphene and suggest new opportunities for tunable mid-infrared photonic and valley-optoelectronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文理论研究了单轴应变下谷极化双层石墨烯的线性和二阶非线性光学响应，发现应变可反转二次谐波电流方向，实现机械控制的非线性光开关。
AI.motivation: 探索在谷极化双层石墨烯中通过单轴应变调控非线性光学响应的机制，特别是实现可切换的二次谐波产生，为谷光电子学提供新的调控手段。
AI.method: 采用包含三角翘曲和应变诱导各向异性的低能有效哈密顿量，基于量子动力学框架计算光学极化率，分析线性和二阶非线性光学响应。
AI.result: 单轴应变可产生高度各向异性的二次谐波光谱；在ℏω≈Ef和ℏω≈2Ef处出现共振增强；改变应变符号可反转二次谐波电流方向。
AI.conclusion: 应变工程可有效调控双层石墨烯中谷相关的非线性光学现象，为可调中红外光子学和谷光电子学应用提供新机会。

title: Proximity-Induced Skyrmion Stabilization at the Cu2OSeO3/Bi2Se3 Interface
summary: We investigate proximity-induced magnetic interactions at the interface between the topological insulator Bi2Se3 and the chiral magnetic insulator Cu2OSeO3, with particular focus on the low temperature skyrmion phase. Broadband ferromagnetic resonance spectroscopy reveals enhanced stability of noncollinear spin textures in the Cu2OSeO3/Bi2Se3 heterostructure compared with bare Cu2OSeO3. In addition to an extra resonance mode in the tilted conical phase that is absent in bare Cu2OSeO3, field cycling resolves two counterclockwise skyrmion resonance branches separated by approximately 238 MHz, consistent with the coexistence of a bulk skyrmion lattice and an interfacial skyrmion phase stabilized by proximity-induced exchange coupling and enhanced interfacial Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions. The finite frequency separation indicates that the two skyrmion phases occupy distinct magnetic energy landscapes while retaining similar resonance character. Resonant elastic x-ray scattering measurements further confirm that the interfacial skyrmion phase spans a broader magnetic-field range than the bulk phase, demonstrating enhanced stability and ordering of topological spin textures at the interface. These findings establish interface engineering as a promising route for extending the stability regime of skyrmion and tilted-conical phases in topological-magnetic heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 通过宽带铁磁共振和共振弹性X射线散射，发现Cu2OSeO3/Bi2Se3异质结界面处近邻效应诱导的交换耦合和增强的Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用可稳定斯格明子相，界面斯格明子相在更宽磁场范围内存在，且与体相斯格明子晶格共存，频率间隔约238 MHz。
AI.motivation: 探索拓扑绝缘体Bi2Se3与手性磁绝缘体Cu2OSeO3界面处的近邻诱导磁相互作用，特别是低温斯格明子相的稳定性增强机制，为界面工程调控拓扑自旋织构提供新思路。
AI.method: 宽带铁磁共振谱学（Broadband FMR）和共振弹性X射线散射（Resonant Elastic X-ray Scattering）。
AI.result: (1) Cu2OSeO3/Bi2Se3异质结中非共线自旋织构稳定性增强；(2) 倾斜锥相中出现额外共振模式；(3) 两个逆时针斯格明子共振分支频率间隔约238 MHz，对应体相斯格明子晶格与界面斯格明子相共存；(4) 界面斯格明子相在更宽磁场范围内稳定存在。
AI.conclusion: 界面工程是扩展拓扑-磁异质结中斯格明子相和倾斜锥相稳定区间的有效途径。

title: From Materials Database to Materials Bank: Assetizing Data for AI Driven Materials Innovation
summary: Driven by high-throughput experimentation, computational modeling, and artificial intelligence (AI), materials data has expanded at an unprecedented rate. Conventional materials databases function only as passive repositories, archiving raw experimental records indiscriminately including both successful and failed data, without systematic value filtering or asset management. This creates a critical gap between massive data accumulation and actionable innovation, hindering the identification of high-potential materials and industrial translation. To address this bottleneck, we propose an industrialization-oriented Materials Bank, a dedicated valuefiltering and assetization layer that operates beyond traditional databases. It does not merely curate high-quality data but systematically elevates qualified candidates into standardized, upgradable materials assets via a multi-dimensional BankCard framework covering scientific validity, synthesis feasibility, application readiness, and industrial value. By unifying databases, AI models, automated experimentation, and multi-criteria assessment into a cohesive closed-loop ecosystem, the Materials Bank establishes a clear trajectory from data to knowledge, candidate, asset, and product. It serves not as an enhanced database or screening tool, but as a decision infrastructure bridging academic discovery and industrial demand, offering a scalable paradigm to accelerate AI-driven materials innovation and deliver tangible real-world impact.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种工业化导向的"材料银行"（Materials Bank）框架，它超越传统数据库，通过多维BankCard评估体系对材料数据进行价值过滤和资产化，将合格材料转化为标准化、可升级的资产，建立从数据到产品的完整闭环，以加速AI驱动的材料创新和产业转化。
AI.motivation: 传统材料数据库只是被动存储库，不加区分地存档实验记录（包括成功和失败数据），缺乏系统性价值过滤和资产管理，导致海量数据积累与可操作创新之间存在巨大鸿沟，阻碍了高潜力材料的识别和工业转化。
AI.method: 提出工业化导向的Materials Bank框架：1) 作为价值过滤和资产化层，超越传统数据库；2) 通过多维BankCard框架（涵盖科学有效性、合成可行性、应用就绪度和工业价值）将合格候选材料标准化为可升级的资产；3) 将数据库、AI模型、自动化实验和多准则评估整合为闭环生态系统。
AI.result: 该框架建立了从数据到知识、候选、资产、产品的清晰轨迹，作为连接学术发现与工业需求的决策基础设施，提供了可扩展的范式来加速AI驱动的材料创新。
AI.conclusion: Materials Bank不是增强版数据库或筛选工具，而是一个决策基础设施，能够弥合学术发现与工业需求之间的差距，为材料科学领域的AI创新提供可落地的实际影响。

title: Energy-time entanglement from a monolithically integrated quantum dot on silicon
summary: Scalable quantum photonic technologies require deterministic sources of entangled photons that are compatible with established semiconductor manufacturing platforms. While self-assembled III--V semiconductor quantum dots are among the most promising sources of on-demand entanglement generation, their integration with silicon-based architectures remains a central challenge. Here, we demonstrate energy--time entanglement from a single InGaAs/GaAs quantum dot monolithically grown on a silicon substrate. Under coherent two-photon excitation, we achieve coherent control of the biexciton--exciton cascade, evidenced by Rabi oscillations and dressed-state formation. Using a four-channel Franson interferometer, we observe phase-dependent two-photon interference with visibilities up to $(64.0 \pm 7.0)\%$ for an 80 ps integration window (and $(49.4 \pm 1.9)\%$ for a 1600 ps window), approaching the threshold for Bell inequality violation at short time scales. These results establish monolithically integrated III--V-on-silicon quantum dots as promising sources of energy--time entangled photons for scalable quantum photonic technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了在硅衬底上单片生长的InGaAs/GaAs量子点中实现能量-时间纠缠光子对，通过相干双光子激发和Franson干涉测量，证明了该集成方案有望用于可扩展量子光子技术。
AI.motivation: 可扩展量子光子技术需要确定性的纠缠光子源，并兼容成熟半导体制造平台。自组装III-V族量子点是极具前景的确定性纠缠源，但其与硅基架构的集成仍是核心挑战。
AI.method: 在硅衬底上单片生长InGaAs/GaAs量子点，采用相干双光子激发双激子-激子级联过程，通过Rabi振荡和缀饰态形成实现相干控制，并使用四通道Franson干涉仪测量相位依赖的双光子干涉可见度。
AI.result: 80 ps积分窗口下双光子干涉可见度达到(64.0 ± 7.0)%，1600 ps窗口下为(49.4 ± 1.9)%，短时间尺度接近贝尔不等式违背阈值。
AI.conclusion: 单片集成的III-V-on-silicon量子点是可扩展量子光子技术中有前景的能量-时间纠缠光子源。

title: Untangling 3D atomic reconstruction in twisted bilayer 2D crystals via dark field transmission electron microscopy
summary: Reconstruction of the atomic crystal structure in twisted 2D materials has been demonstrated to be responsible for multiple exciting phenomena in van der Waals heterostructures, from the appearance of flat bands in twisted bilayer graphene to Wigner crystallization in transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs). However, there are still no experimental methods for accessing the 3D atomic distributions nor models that describe the exact atomic shifts in such reconstructed structures, which significantly impedes the development of the field. Dark field (DF) transmission electron microscopy (TEM) has been conventionally employed to visualize the local in-plane atomic displacements. Here we expand this method to obtain a full description of the reconstructed atomic systems and demonstrate the quantitative relations between the local stacking and the intensity in the DF image. We show how local 3D atomic displacements and the interlayer distance can be extracted from a DF image.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扭曲二维材料中原子晶体结构的重构，提出了一种基于暗场透射电镜（DF TEM）的新方法，能够从二维图像中提取局部三维原子位移和层间距，填补了该领域缺乏实验手段和理论模型的空白。
AI.motivation: 扭曲二维材料中的原子重构对多种奇特现象（如平坦能带、维格纳结晶）至关重要，但目前缺乏获取三维原子分布的实验方法，也缺少描述重构结构中原子精确位移的理论模型，严重阻碍了该领域的发展。
AI.method: 扩展暗场透射电镜（DF TEM）方法，建立局部堆叠与暗场图像强度之间的定量关系，从而从DF图像中提取局部三维原子位移和层间距信息。
AI.result: 证明了DF图像强度与局部堆叠之间的定量关系，并展示了如何从单张DF图像中提取重构系统中的三维原子位移和层间距。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为扭曲二维材料中原子重构的三维结构表征提供了可行的实验途径，有望推动范德华异质结构领域的进一步发展。

title: Tuning topological phase and Dirac point position via Pb and Sb substitution in Mn$_{1-x}$Pb$_{x}$(Bi$_{1-y}$Sb$_{y}$)$_{2}$Te$_{4}$
summary: This study presents a systematic investigation of Mn$_{1-x}$Pb$_{x}$(Bi$_{1-y}$Sb$_{y}$)$_{2}$Te$_{4}$ crystals over a wide range of concentrations (x = 10-60%, y = 5-60%). It was found that the value of the bulk band gap is determined exclusively by the Pb concentration and it closes at Pb 40-50 %, which corresponds to a topological phase transition. The position of the Dirac point is determined by the Pb/Sb ratio, rather than the absolute Sb content. The magnetic properties depend on the dilution of the Mn sublattice by Pb and are weakly sensitive to Sb. We show that the simultaneous substitution of Mn and Bi allows independent control of the topological phase and the position of the Fermi level.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了Mn$_{1-x}$Pb$_{x}$(Bi$_{1-y}$Sb$_{y}$)$_{2}$Te$_{4}$晶体，发现Pb浓度决定体带隙闭合及拓扑相变（40-50%），Pb/Sb比决定狄拉克点位置，磁性由Mn亚晶格稀释主导，且Mn/Bi共掺杂可独立调控拓扑相与费米能级位置。
AI.motivation: 探究Mn$_{1-x}$Pb$_{x}$(Bi$_{1-y}$Sb$_{y}$)$_{2}$Te$_{4}$体系中不同元素掺杂对拓扑相变、电子结构及磁性的影响机制，寻找独立调控拓扑相与费米能级的可行途径。
AI.method: 在宽浓度范围（x=10-60%, y=5-60%）内系统合成Mn$_{1-x}$Pb$_{x}$(Bi$_{1-y}$Sb$_{y}$)$_{2}$Te$_{4}$晶体，通过测量体带隙、狄拉克点位置及磁性质，分析Pb、Sb掺杂对各物理量的独立与耦合效应。
AI.result: 1) 体带隙仅由Pb浓度决定，在Pb 40-50%时闭合，对应拓扑相变；2) 狄拉克点位置由Pb/Sb比（而非绝对Sb含量）决定；3) 磁性主要受Mn被Pb稀释影响，对Sb不敏感；4) Mn和Bi共掺可实现拓扑相与费米能级的独立控制。
AI.conclusion: 通过合理选择Mn位和Bi位的掺杂元素（Pb和Sb），能够在Mn(Bi,Sb)$_{2}$Te$_{4}$体系中实现对拓扑相变和费米能级位置的独立调控，为相关拓扑量子材料的设计提供新策略。

title: Geometrically necessary boundaries accommodate the residual elastic strain in cold-rolled Fe-3%Si
summary: The relationship between plastic deformation accommodation structures and residual elastic strain fields in deformed metals is poorly understood at the intragranular scale, largely because no experimental technique has provided simultaneous, three-dimensional, bulk-sensitive access to both fields at the length scale of dislocation boundaries. Here we use dark-field X-ray microscopy (DFXM) to map intragranular misorientation and residual elastic strain simultaneously in three dimensions within a grain of 50% cold-rolled Fe 3%Si alloy. We resolve geometrically necessary boundaries (GNBs) and incidental dislocation boundary (IDB) cell structures in the bulk non-destructively. Correlating the elastic strain field with the segmented plastically deformed substructure reveals that GNBs act as the primary carriers and distributors of long range residual elastic strain. GNBs separate subdomains of distinct mean d-spacing, across the grain volume. The plastic misorientation associated with IDBs and dislocation cells develops within GNB-delimited subdomains that carry comparatively similar values of elastic strain. This supports a mechanistic picture in which GNBs accommodate nearly all the long-range residual elastic strain in the deformed state, while plastic slip propagates into GNB interiors to organize into IDB cells with similar strain levels. The three-dimensional misorientation and strain gradients quantified here provide direct experimental input for recovery and recrystallization modelling in ferritic steels, such as electrical steels.

AI.tldr: 本文利用暗场X射线显微镜（DFXM）对50%冷轧Fe-3%Si合金晶粒内部进行了三维取向差与残余弹性应变的同时成像，发现几何必要边界（GNBs）是长程残余弹性应变的主要载体和分配者，而偶然位错边界（IDBs）则在其限定亚域内组织，为形变金属的回复和再结晶建模提供了实验依据。
AI.motivation: 理解形变金属中塑性变形容纳结构与残余弹性应变场之间的内在关系，目前缺乏能在位错边界尺度上同时对两者进行三维、体相敏感测量的实验技术。
AI.method: 采用暗场X射线显微镜（DFXM）对50%冷轧Fe-3%Si合金的一个晶粒进行三维成像，同时映射晶内取向差和残余弹性应变，并对塑性变形亚结构进行分割和关联分析。
AI.result: GNBs是长程残余弹性应变的主要载体；IDBs和位错胞结构在GNB限定的亚域内产生，这些亚域具有相似的弹性应变值；GNBs分隔了具有不同平均d间距的亚域。
AI.conclusion: GNBs几乎承载了形变状态下的全部长程残余弹性应变，而塑性滑移在GNB内部传播并组织成具有相似应变水平的IDB胞结构。所获三维取向差和应变梯度数据可直接用于铁素体钢（如电工钢）的回复和再结晶建模。

title: Growth optimization of shallow Ge quantum wells grown by molecular beam epitaxy
summary: Shallow strained Ge quantum wells have gained recent attention for realizing scalable, high-performance hybrid superconductor/semiconductor-based qubits. Epitaxial superconducting contacts can improve the quality and consistency of the superconductor/semiconductor interface. The growth of Ge quantum wells by molecular beam epitaxy is then motivating due to the relative ease of integration with epitaxial superconductor growth. However, the performance of Ge quantum wells grown by molecular beam epitaxy (MBE) has been limited. To improve the properties of MBE-grown Ge quantum wells, the growth conditions were systematically optimized. Thick buffer layers are utilized to eliminate certain defects, and an optimal growth temperature is found. A peak hole mobility of 105,000 cm\textsuperscript{2}/Vs at 2 K is obtained in a 22-nm deep Ge quantum well, demonstrating that the Ge quantum wells grown in this study represent the highest mobilities for shallow MBE-grown samples. Mobility modeling indicates that the increase in mobility due to growth temperature optimization are likely due to a reduction in interface roughness scattering, and further improvements in mobility are expected through improved surface passivation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统优化分子束外延(MBE)生长条件，在浅层应变锗量子阱中实现了最高空穴迁移率105,000 cm²/Vs（2K），发现最佳生长温度和厚缓冲层可减少缺陷，且迁移率提升归因于界面粗糙度散射的降低。
AI.motivation: 浅层应变锗量子阱在超导/半导体混合量子比特中具有潜力，但MBE生长的Ge量子阱性能受限，需要优化生长条件以提升质量。
AI.method: 系统优化MBE生长条件，采用厚缓冲层消除缺陷，寻找最佳生长温度，并通过迁移率建模分析散射机制。
AI.result: 在22nm深Ge量子阱中，2K下获得峰值空穴迁移率105,000 cm²/Vs，为浅层MBE样品最高值。
AI.conclusion: 生长温度优化通过降低界面粗糙度散射提升迁移率，未来可通过改善表面钝化进一步提高性能。

title: Spin-related transport in a polycrystalline NiCo2O4 film: Drastic current-induced change in resistivity-temperature characteristics via spin injection
summary: We have studied spin-related transport in a polycrystalline NiCo2O4 (NCO) film on a MgAl2O4/Si(001) substrate, motivated by potential applications of the theoretical half-metallicity of NCO to Si-based high-performance spin-transport devices. Our approach is to systematically measure and analyze the temperature dependence of the film's resistivity ($ρ-T$) with various in-plane currents (100 nA$-$1 mA) and temperatures (4$-$290 K). With increasing current, the $ρ-T$ curve changes drastically from semiconducting ($dρ/dT<0$) to non-monotonic and eventually toward metallic ($dρ/dT>0$). A distinctive feature is that the single NCO film exhibits a $ρ-T$ characteristic of polycrystalline defective NCO at 100 nA, whereas it exhibits a $ρ-T$ characteristic of epitaxial less-defective NCO over a wide temperature range at 1 mA. This current-induced evolution of $ρ-T$ reflects the enhancement of the Curie temperature of defective regions near grain boundaries, accompanied by enhanced spin alignment there. We proposed a spin-related transport model that extends conventional hopping conduction models by incorporating the temperature- and current-dependent degree of spin alignment, as well as its spatial dependence inherent to polycrystalline NCO. This model comprehensively explains the interplay between the spin-alignment profile and transport mechanism. The analysis reveals that spin injection from grain bodies to grain boundaries enhances the spin alignment there and strengthens double-exchange interactions, facilitating conduction. This phenomenon strongly depends on both temperature and current. Our findings provide evidence of spin-polarized electrons inside the grain bodies, highlighting the potential of our polycrystalline NCO film as an efficient spin source. The present model is further supported by current$-$voltage and magnetoresistance features.

AI.tldr: 研究了多晶NiCo2O4薄膜中电流诱导的电阻率-温度特性从半导体型向金属型转变的现象，提出了一种考虑自旋排列程度（温度、电流和空间依赖）的扩展跳跃传导模型，揭示了晶界处自旋注入增强双交换相互作用并促进传导的机制。
AI.motivation: 利用NiCo2O4理论上具有的半金属性，开发基于硅衬底的高性能自旋输运器件。需要深入理解多晶NCO薄膜中的自旋相关输运机制，特别是电流和温度对自旋排列的影响。
AI.method: 系统测量多晶NiCo2O4薄膜在不同电流（100 nA–1 mA）和温度（4–290 K）下的电阻率-温度曲线；分析电流引起的ρ-T特征从半导体型向金属型的演化；提出扩展跳跃传导模型，纳入温度和电流依赖的自旋排列程度及其空间不均匀性；通过电流-电压特性和磁电阻特征验证模型。
AI.result: 低电流(100 nA)时薄膜表现为多晶缺陷态NCO的半导体行为；高电流(1 mA)时表现为外延少缺陷NCO的金属行为。电流增大使缺陷区域（晶界）的居里温度升高，自旋排列增强。提出的自旋输运模型能全面解释自旋排列轮廓与输运机制之间的相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 多晶NCO薄膜中晶粒体内部存在自旋极化电子，可作为高效自旋源；电流通过自旋注入增强晶界处的自旋排列和双交换作用，从而改变输运特性；该工作为硅基自旋器件提供了实验和理论依据。

title: Accelerated development of amorphous InZnO thin films as transparent conductive Cu diffusion barriers
summary: In light of the increasing supply chain concerns regarding silver for solar cell metallization, the replacement of the silver contacts by copper is desirable. As copper diffuses readily in silicon, deposition of an additional diffusion barrier to protect the respective absorber material stacks is required. We investigate multifunctional layers of transparent conductive oxides (TCOs) from the In-Zn-O system to serve as front electrode and Cu diffusion barrier coating, focusing on purely amorphous layers without grain boundaries to impede copper diffusion. We employ a 2D combinatorial approach to simultaneously screen the Zn/(In+Zn) ratio and the oxygen content in a single materials library deposited by magnetron sputtering without intentional substrate heating. Cu diffusion barrier performance was evaluated by depositing Cu on top of intentionally ultrathin In-Zn-O libraries of 7 nm on silicon wafers and annealing them at temperatures of 200-450°C. Both the formation of copper silicides, as well as the silicon photoluminescence signal were monitored. The first was detected only after the crystallization of the In-Zn-O films and required annealing temperatures of 450°C and above. Even for extended dwell times of 20 h at a relevant process temperature of 200°C, we find no evidence of Cu ingress for most of our fabricated In-Zn-O compositions, whereas Si/Cu stacks without In-Zn-O barriers showed a reduction of their photo-luminescence intensity already after less than 1 h. These results suggest thin amorphous In-Zn-O films with an optimal Zn/(In+Zn) ratio of ~0.12 and intermediate oxygen deficiency as effective transparent conductive Cu diffusion barriers for solar cell applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了用于太阳能电池的In-Zn-O透明导电氧化物薄膜，作为铜扩散阻挡层。发现非晶态In-Zn-O薄膜（Zn/(In+Zn)比例约0.12，中等氧缺乏）在200°C下20小时仍能有效阻挡铜扩散，而传统无阻挡层的Si/Cu结构在1小时内即失效。
AI.motivation: 由于银在太阳能电池金属化中供应链成本上升，需要寻找铜替代方案。但铜在硅中易扩散，需沉积扩散阻挡层。本文旨在探索In-Zn-O体系的多功能透明导电氧化物薄膜，同时作为前电极和铜扩散阻挡层。
AI.method: 采用2D组合方法，通过磁控溅射无衬底加热条件下制备In-Zn-O材料库，同时筛选Zn/(In+Zn)比例和氧含量。将超薄（7nm）In-Zn-O薄膜沉积在硅片上，再覆盖铜层，在200-450°C下退火，监测硅化铜形成和硅光致发光信号来评估阻挡性能。
AI.result: 铜硅化物仅在In-Zn-O薄膜结晶后（450°C及以上）才检测到。在200°C工艺温度下延长至20小时，大多数In-Zn-O成分无铜渗入证据；而无In-Zn-O阻挡层的Si/Cu结构在不到1小时内光致发光强度即下降。
AI.conclusion: 薄的非晶态In-Zn-O薄膜（最佳Zn/(In+Zn)比例约0.12，中等氧缺乏）可作为太阳能电池中有效的透明导电铜扩散阻挡层。

title: Optimizing Ti substitution for the enhanced densification, ionic conductivity, and microstructure of garnet-type Li$_7$La$_3$Zr$_2$O$_{12}$ solid electrolytes
summary: Garnet-type lithium lanthanum zirconium oxide Li$_7$La$_3$Zr$_2$O$_{12}$ (LLZO) is a favorable solid electrolyte for all-solid-state Li-ion batteries due to its wide electrochemical stability, compatible ionic conductivity, and good safety. However, further improvement in ionic conductivity is required for its practical applications. In this work, titanium (Ti) is doped into LLZO to enhance its Li-ion transport properties and structural stability. The series Li$_7$La$_3$Zr$_{2-x}$Ti$_x$O$_{12}$ has been successfully synthesized using conventional solid-state reaction method. The content of Ti has been varied from 0 to 0.20 atoms per formula unit (a.p.f.u). The conducting cubic phase has been confirmed by the X-ray diffraction technique (XRD). Scanning electron microscopy (SEM) and energy dispersive spectroscopy (EDS) have been used for structural analysis, and elemental distribution. Density measurements have been carried out for all the samples. Electrochemical impedance spectroscopy revealed that the high ionic conductivity of $8.08\times 10^{-5}$ Scm$^{-1}$ is offered by the Li$_7$La$_3$Zr$_{1.9}$Ti$_{0.1}$O$_{12}$ sample, which has the lowest activation energy of 0.37 eV. The DC polarization analysis verified that the main contribution to conductivity in the 0.10 Ti sample comes from ions. A one order of magnitude increase in room temperature ionic conductivity is observed for the 0.10 Ti sample, making it a strong candidate for solid electrolyte applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Ti掺杂LLZO固态电解质，成功合成了Li₇La₃Zr₂₋ₓTiₓO₁₂系列材料，其中x=0.10时室温离子电导率提升一个数量级（8.08×10⁻⁵ S/cm），活化能降至0.37 eV，并保持了立方相结构稳定性，证明Ti掺杂是提升LLZO性能的有效策略。
AI.motivation: LLZO作为全固态电池的候选固态电解质材料，虽然具有宽电化学窗口、合适的离子电导率和良好的安全性，但其离子电导率仍需进一步提高以满足实际应用需求。因此，本研究旨在通过Ti掺杂来增强LLZO的锂离子传输性能和结构稳定性。
